subcodes.first_line: This is a Tablet from Our presence unto him who hath believed and been guided aright and hath attained unto the recognition of God, the Lord of the latter and the former [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا لوح من لدنا الی الذی آمن و هدی و فاز بعرفان الله رب الاخره و الاولی e
subcodes.subjects: @Greatest Name, @belief and denial, @Manifestation of God as tree of life; sadratu'l-muntaha, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
